| Competition Type | 1:1 task based |
| :---- | :---- |
| Activation | 5 working days |
| Activation Cost | Low |
| Duration  | 1 month |
| Feature available | Account Linkage, Prize Expiration, Customer Data Platform |
| Assets Template | [Public documents](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1BMAXEqEaOHeklBHNCG_8O4LMwUA5KQTc)  |
| UX Flows | [https://www.figma.com/board/2W0JrJGezPH3PMggxDnATA/Ads-%26-Sponsorship---UX-flows?node-id=0-1\&t=q3fJLXa8ZEiPUFrY-1](https://www.figma.com/board/2W0JrJGezPH3PMggxDnATA/Ads-%26-Sponsorship---UX-flows?node-id=0-1&t=q3fJLXa8ZEiPUFrY-1)Connect your Figma account |
| Design file | \[outdated\] |

**Overview**

Ideal for brands seeking Engagement and User Acquisition KPIs.

FACEIT Missions among the most favoured brand integration types. No limit on concurrent Missions from various advertisers. Typically spans at least one month for ample user challenge completion time. Simplified tracking of customer conversion and prize allocation. Auto-activated by User, Geo, and age targeting. Offers low activation costs.

 

![image-20240430-185832.png][image1]

 

More Missions examples [here](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1PnD5pfk6ElbFqhSxuegL02gvwtPAOLLl)

---

**How It Works**

When users automatically join a branded mission, they must complete a series of in-game tasks to earn points, coupons, and prizes. It facilitates direct 1-on-1 interaction with target customers, adds value to gamers' experiences, and enables easy tracking of customer conversions. Missions are game-related.

**User Experience**

1. **Auto-Join**: Users must be active on the platform (play at least one match), and the mission will activate automatically. An activity notification will alert the user, with the first task automatically selected. Clicking on the notification directs users to the Mission page. Users have the option to manually deactivate the mission.

![Screenshot 2024-04-29 at 16.30.12.png][image2]

![Screenshot 2024-05-02 at 11.34.42.png][image3]

2. **Task Completion and Reward Assignment**: After completing the task, the reward is assigned, and the user receives a notification confirming the activity. The second task is automatically selected, even if the prize claim is pending. Clicking on the notification redirects the user to the order page where they can claim the prize.

![Screenshot 2024-04-29 at 16.32.30.png][image4]

3. The second task is either manually activated by the user or it’s automatically selected as soon as the user plays another match (aka active)

---

**Prizes**

**Prize Redemption**

Users can redeem the prize (in this case, a voucher) by following the instructions provided on the order page.

1. Copy & Paste: User can copy and paste the code and click on the CTA that would redirect it to the advertiser website

![image (1).png][image5]

2. Embedded Code: User can click on the button and be redirected on the page with the code already embedded in the URL

![image.png][image6]

3. Auto-Claim: this feature is only available with the account linkage, visit [this page](https://efgcloud.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/AD/pages/3872489532) for more details

![image-20240502-103132.png][image7]

**Type of  prizes**

1. Advertiser vouchers  
   1. free bets  
   2. raffle tickets  
   3. credits  
2. Material Prizes (the advertiser is responsible for the delivery)  
3. Faceit Points  
4. Faceit Premium Subscriptions (users will automatically get a premium sub or extent for a month their current subscription)  
5. Faceit Skins  
* Faceit products can be also delivered behind mandatory advertiser account linkage.  
* Despite we can distribute raffle tickets, Faceit **cannot** run any raffles competition due to legal requirements, the raffle needs to be done on the advertisers side

---

**Key Features**

**Prizes Expiration Time**

**![Screenshot 2024-04-30 at 10.50.19.png][image8]**

Advertisers have the option to set an expiration time for when users can claim their prizes. This feature ensures that users can still claim prizes even after the mission has ended. By setting an expiration time, advertisers can prevent users from claiming prizes after the campaign expiration, maintaining campaign integrity and user satisfaction.

**Account Linkage**

This competition support the account linkage feature.

Please checkout the Account Linkage one pager for more informations

**Custom Missions (or CDP)**: **Type of Prizes**

This competition support the CDP feature.

Please checkout the Customer Data Platform one pager for more informations  
---

**Legal & Privacy**

Each Mission with account linkage must have an hock privacy policy to be displayed on the Mission page

Example of

* Mission Privacy Policy: [Winline Mission Privacy Notice](https://support.faceit.com/hc/en-us/articles/13483161419420-Winline-Mission-Privacy-Notice)  
* Mission Risk Assessment: [Winline Privacy Risk Assessment \- EFG(95466712.3).docx](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ke8pXxynWGtuLrApqeuONMOVeNBYjjBw/view)

---

**Glossary**

| Campaign | This is the internal name used for Missions (including the single tasks) |
| :---- | :---- |
| Task / Challange | The actions that the user must complete in order to finish the Mission |
| Prize / Reward | It refers to the award given to the users after each task |
| Voucher | Type of prize provided by the advertiser that can be redeemed by the user |
| Code | It’s the alphanumerical part of the voucher |
|   |   |
